name: Optimal Hub
description: OptimalOS kanban + ReturnPro financial board access for OpenClaw agents. Exposes board view/create/claim/update/complete tools backed by the dual Supabase architecture.

returnproSupabaseUrl.description: ReturnPro Supabase URL (financial staging, dim tables). Optional — required only for return-pro tools.

returnproSupabaseServiceKey.description: ReturnPro Supabase service role key. Optional — required only when returnproSupabaseUrl is set.

defaultActor.description: Default actor name recorded on activity_log entries when no caller identity is available.

optimalSupabaseUrl.label: OptimalOS Supabase URL
optimalSupabaseUrl.help: Project URL for the OptimalOS Supabase instance (kanban + activity log).

optimalSupabaseServiceKey.label: OptimalOS Service Key
optimalSupabaseServiceKey.help: Service role key with read/write on tasks, comments, activity_log.

returnproSupabaseUrl.label: ReturnPro Supabase URL
returnproSupabaseUrl.help: Optional ReturnPro project URL — leave blank if you don't need ReturnPro reads.

defaultActor.label: Default Actor
defaultActor.help: Actor identifier written to activity_log when no agent name is supplied.
